ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., Plastic, Metal, Composite) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the material */,
  "material_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each material */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was manufactured */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the material in days */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the material */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material to which this specification belongs */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., Dielectric Constant) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., Yes, No, Explain) */,
  "offered_value" TEXT /* Offered value by the supplier */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Additional remarks or comments */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification value */,
  "standard_value" TEXT /* Standard value for the specification */,
  "deviation_allowed" TEXT /* Acceptable deviation from the standard value */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the specification */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the supplier holds */,
  "supplier_rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the supplier based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the compliance check */,
  "compliance_standard" TEXT /* Specific compliance standard being checked */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the check */,
  "inspection_method" TEXT /* Method used for the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, compliance officer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type (e.g., Plastic, Metal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "average_density" TEXT /* Average density of the material type */,
  "common_uses" TEXT /* Common uses of the material type in the industry */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the material type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* Value after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the change approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_history_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES specifications ("specification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance guideline */,
  "applicable_material_types" TEXT /* Material types to which the guideline applies */,
  "document_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the document containing the guideline */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the guideline became effective */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last revised the guideline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the check */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the quality check */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "target_market" TEXT /* Target market for the product line */,
  "sales_volume" TEXT /* Sales volume of the product line */,
  "profit_margin" TEXT /* Profit margin of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being used */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line using the material */,
  "usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of material used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the material used */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number associated with the material */,
  "cost_per_unit" TEXT /* Cost per unit of the material used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_usage_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_usage_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
